And so Pete Lillo and I are in a car keeps taking us to lunch We think he's taking us to lunch be a nice guy. How nice keeps in town. He's taking us to lunch He's taking us to lunch break the news to us. He's moving all the business to another vendor Why because he's going to save a penny a cassette a Penny a cassette in a six tape album that's six cents And he said of course you understand because business biz Never forgot it Not mad about it. He's right Business biz that's what the relationship is Now the decision is still stupid, but that's neither here nor there It is reality So the idea that you are going to keep them based on contributions past We have a saying at the racetrack what have you done for me lately? Because the nature of race horses is they slow down as they age Just like we do So horse made you thirty thousand bucks last year this year. He's struggling to finish into money at all Don't matter. He made us 30 grand last year. Don't matter. He's made 300 grand lifetime. What did you do this week? He's eating this week He ain't eating in our memories he's eating this week What have you done for me lately? It's how everyone is You'll keep them based on the loyalty of friendship know it'll work exactly the opposite way as we just discussed if it turns into friendship Not only won't you the only way you'll keep them is if you're going to give them everything for free It's the only way to keep them and that's not a game that you want to be in Let's get the page for a second We'll stay on retention for a second Go to page 47 we're going to come back to it Three most important truths about retention Clients continue based more on their feelings than on realities including accomplishments and results Funny for a guy that's not a touchy feely guy, but break the news to you. We're in a feelings business It's all about how they feel about us how they feel about themselves how they feel about the experience that they are having Not really about the results Clients will divorce themselves based on their feelings even in spite of accomplishment and results Make the guy a million dollars But he ain't having fun at the meetings He's gone make the guy a million dollars But he didn't get his moment in the spotlight this month and feels shorted and slighted and didn't get recognition. He's gone It is the careful assessment control and manipulation of their feelings that is essential to retention and ascension It's all about how they feel Not what's actually happening what has happened not what the results are There's got to be results But the difference between adequate results and superior results do not translate into a difference in retention That's not where you get it you get it from how they feel that's where you get it So additional mistakes Delivering too much content So we're gonna try and give more value that's how we'll retain them They're dropping out. Let's add four more ccds a month. Let's do six calls instead of four calls Let's do eight-hour meetings instead of four-hour meetings. Let's do three extra meetings Let's let him call me in the middle of the night on the cell phone. Let's let him email me. Let's add. Let's add Let's add. Let's add. Let's add won't matter Enough is enough You may have too little but at some point piling on more value won't affect retention won't do it and in fact too much content Number one reason why people drop out of any laser Kennedy program guess what? Too much stuff I mean translation too much value give us less value then we'll stay Well, it sounds stupid when you say it that way doesn't it well it is stupid But nevertheless its reality because see when you give them too much stuff For them and they can't like process it and they can't handle it and it's too much information then they start to feel inadequate When people have negative feelings, what do they do? They try and get away from whatever is causing the negative feelings you they don't try to correct their own behavior by the way forget that They try and get away from whatever is causing the negative feelings So if you're causing negative feelings are going to get away from you if you're causing positive feelings Then they're going to want to be around you all they can't So you can't give too much content
